## Description

What changed?

## Rationale

Why is this change needed? What tradeoff or risk does it address?

## Verification

- [ ] `make ci-core`
- [ ] Additional checks:

## Security and Operations Impact

Call out secret handling, release behavior, provider behavior, policy impact, or
operational changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits include a DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior, configuration, metrics, or operations changed
- [ ] No plaintext secret, token, full ciphertext, credential value, or production endpoint included
